## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Scope Notes

- does this stay within the current Apple Silicon local-first direction?
- does it require new dependencies, tools, or broader platform support?
- what docs or tests would need to change?
